mapper.select: SELECT id, enabled, cron_expression, target_type, target_host_ids, probe_account, probe_service, probe_process, probe_app, created_at, updated_at FROM probe_schedule_config LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE probe_schedule_config SET enabled = #{enabled}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, target_type = #{targetType}, target_host_ids = #{targetHostIds}, probe_account = #{probeAccount}, probe_service = #{probeService}, probe_process = #{probeProcess}, probe_app = #{probeApp}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
